REASON: The document correctly identifies the real PRISMA 2020 Statement (Page et al., BMJ 2021, doi:10.1136/bmj.n71) and its genuine purpose, but the body text — particularly the "Citation Verification" and "Common Errors in Citation Practice" sections — does not reflect the actual PRISMA 2020 checklist content and appears to be invented editorial material not found in the real guideline.
